purpose: REPL-style debug console mounted in BottomPanel. Subscribes via window.electronAPI.on('debug-output', ...) and 'debug-stopped' for live stdout/stderr/log lines, and exposes a single-line input that becomes enabled only when state.debugSession.status === 'paused'. Pressing Enter calls window.electronAPI.debugEvaluate(expr, callFrameId) where callFrameId comes from debugCallStack[0].id (top frame from AppContext). Maintains a bounded output buffer (MAX_OUTPUT_ENTRIES = 1000, FIFO trim) with monotonic entryIdCounter. Implements 'sticky bottom' auto-scroll: autoScrollRef tracks whether user is within 30px of bottom; manual scroll-up disables auto-scroll until user returns. Strips ANSI escape sequences from output text via stripAnsi (regex /\x1b\[[0-9;]*[a-zA-Z]|\x1b\].*?\x07/g). Up/Down arrows traverse a deduplicated commandHistory (most recent at end). Each entry is rendered with timestamp + type label ('out', 'err', '>>>', '<<<', 'sys') + colored CSS class.
gotchas: MAX_OUTPUT_ENTRIES = 1000 — older entries silently dropped via slice(combined.length - MAX). Long-running processes will lose history.
entryIdCounter is module-level — it persists across remounts and across Hot Module Reload; that's intentional so React keys never collide, but it grows unboundedly.

Input is disabled unless debugSession.status === 'paused' — REPL evaluation against a running V8 inspector requires a paused execution context (Runtime.evaluate without callFrameId is allowed but the spec wires it to the top frame).
callFrameId is taken from debugCallStack[0]?.id — if the call stack is empty even when paused, eval still proceeds with `undefined` callFrameId (global scope).
Auto-scroll threshold is hardcoded 30px — this is the 'within bottom' tolerance; changing it changes how aggressive auto-scroll feels.
ANSI regex includes both CSI sequences (\x1b\[...) AND OSC sequences (\x1b\]...\x07) — incomplete sequences may slip through.
stripAnsi regex has // eslint-disable-next-line no-control-regex because control chars are intentional.
patterns: Push-event subscription in useEffect with cleanup function returned from window.electronAPI.on() — the API returns its own unsubscribe function.
Sticky-bottom auto-scroll uses ref (autoScrollRef) instead of state — avoids re-render cascades during rapid output.
Command history dedup: filter out duplicates of new expr first, then append → most recent at index length-1.
Type-driven CSS class via TYPE_CLASS_MAP lookup (stdout, stderr, log, eval-input/result/error, system).
conventions: All entry types defined as TYPE_CLASS_MAP / TYPE_LABELS twin maps for symmetry.
OutputLine is a memoizable inner component (not memoized currently — opportunity for perf if buffer grows).
